Discover
01 — Our Story

More than a drink.
It's a moment.

Qwenched was born from one simple belief: that not drinking should never mean missing out. We built a premium drinks experience — entirely alcohol-free — that looks as extraordinary as it tastes.

From our signature LED-lit cups to our neon-glowing stall, every detail is designed to turn heads, spark conversation, and give every guest something worth remembering.

23+ Drinks on menu
100% Alcohol free
All ages Welcome
02 — What We Do

Crafted for every occasion

🥥

Coconut Floats

Our showstopper. Matcha, Pink, and Blue Coconut Floats — served fresh with cream and glitter for maximum visual drama.

☕

Specialty Lattes

Spanish Latte, Dulce De Leche, Biscoff — crafted coffee drinks that go far beyond your average flat white.

🍹

Signature Mocktails

The Grenada, The Bukhara, The Damascus, The Medina — alcohol-free cocktails with the complexity and drama of the real thing.

🍵

Matcha Drinks

Strawberry, Mango, and Peach Matcha — ceremonial grade matcha layered over fruit for that iconic colour-gradient moment.

🍋

Canned Lemonades

Pink, Blue, and Original Lemonade — our house-label canned range to take the Qwenched experience home.

✨

The LED Cup Experience

Every drink is served in our signature illuminated cups — glowing, photogenic, and unlike anything you've seen at an event.

03 — The Menu

Something for
everyone.

Every item on our menu is alcohol-free, all ages welcome, and designed to be just as impressive as anything at a premium bar.

04 — The Experience

Your drink should be as good to look at as it is to drink.

LED cups. Neon signage. A media wall built for content. Qwenched doesn't just serve drinks — it creates a moment people want to share.

Find Us at an Event
05 — Private Events & Functions

We come to you.

Birthdays, weddings, corporate events, brand activations — we bring the full Qwenched experience to your venue. Neon signage, LED cups, custom menus, and a premium setup that becomes the centrepiece of any event.

  • Huge customisability options
  • Custom drink menus
  • Personalised experiences
  • Perfect for any occasion
  • Full neon & LED setup
  • Media wall & photo zone
  • All ages welcome
  • Sydney & surrounds
Enquire About Your Event
06 — The Media Wall

The most photographed spot at the event.

Our branded media wall isn't an afterthought — it's a destination. Guests stop, stay, and shoot. Your event gets organic content. Qwenched gets remembered.

Every visit to Qwenched is content-ready. The wall, the cups, the neon — it all works together to make every moment shareable.

Follow @qwenched

memorable.
